message:
feat(distributed): enrich gap notices with persisted storage bounds

Add distributed_agent_gap_notice_for_persisted_gap() to query and
enrich outgoing gap notices with sequence bounds from persistent
storage, ensuring gap notices sent to aggregators carry authoritative
seq_before/seq_after values rather than transient wire values.

Implementation:
- New function queries storage for gap records matching pane_id + reason
- Maps stored gap into GapNotice wire protocol message
- Enhanced distributed_agent_stream_event(): Gap payloads now enriched
  with persisted bounds before transmission to aggregator

Tests (144 lines):
- distributed_agent_gap_notice_for_persisted_gap_uses_recorded_bounds:
  validates gap lookup retrieves correct seq_before/seq_after from storage
- distributed_persist_payload_explicit_gap_preserves_reported_bounds_in_reason:
  validates persistence encodes bounds in reason field as
  "distributed_gap:<reason>:<seq_before>:<seq_after>" for aggregator
  reconstruction

All changes gated behind #[cfg(feature = "distributed")].

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
